column3: "Neem lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its capability of decreasing the amount of cholesterol in an individual's blood, ultimately promoting better heart health.
"Neem boosts immunity system" refers to its ability to enhance and strengthen one's natural defense mechanism against diseases, making it more resilient and less prone to infections.
"Neem fights cancer cells" refers to its ability to potentially suppress or stop tumor growth by targeting and killing malignant cells, without harming healthy ones.
"Neem reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to minimize swelling and pain caused by redness or irritation of body parts.
"Neem regulates blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to influence and maintain healthy glucose balance within the body, thus benefiting people dealing with diabetes or other related issues.
"Neem treats skin conditions" refers to its use of natural ingredients that help alleviate and cure various issues affecting the skin, creating healthier and clearer complexion.
"Neem relieves digestive issues" refers to its ability to alleviate gastrointestinal problems, such as indigestion and stomach aches, by promoting better overall digestive health.

"Neem prevents heart diseases" refers to its ability to reduce bad cholesterol levels, prevent oxidative stress and blood vessel
        damage, ultimately improving overall cardiovascular health.
"Neem promotes healthy weight gain" refers to its ability to contribute towards proper and balanced body weight, aiding people's weight management without causing harm or excess weight loss.
"Neem enhances brain function" refers to its ability to boost cognitive abilities, improve memory, and promote overall mental well-being.
